scenario.name: invite-malformed
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:[service] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:caller-[call_number]@[local_ip]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:callee-[call_number]@[service]> Call-ID: malformed-[call_number] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: <sip:caller-[call_number]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 1 Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: 4
bad!
